title: Advanced CSS Framework Techniques Quiz
description: Test your expertise on professional CSS framework optimization and maintainability.

questions.question: What is the primary way to customize Tailwind's default design system?
options: Directly editing the node_modules files.
Using the theme section in the tailwind.config.js file.
Adding custom CSS variables to your index.html.
It's not possible to customize it.

questions.question: What's the goal of using PurgeCSS with frameworks like Bootstrap?
options: To add more animation to the site.
To remove any unused CSS classes and reduce the final bundle size.
To automatically generate responsive layouts.
To make the CSS easier to read.

questions.question: What does JIT stand for in Tailwind CSS context?
options: Just-In-Time
JavaScript-Integrated-Testing
Joint-Interoperability-Task
Java-Interactive-Toolkit

questions.question: How do container queries differ from standard media queries?
options: They are only for images.
They respond to the size of a parent element rather than the whole screen (viewport).
They are faster to render.
They only work in mobile browsers.

questions.question: What's a common way to maintain Tailwind CSS styles in a large application?
options: Always using raw HTML classes everywhere.
Extracting common patterns into reusable frontend components (e.g., in React).
Only using one CSS file for the entire project.
Avoiding Tailwind altogether.
